kind: Job
metadata:

    kubectl.kubernetes.io/last-applied-configuration: |

  creationTimestamp: "2026-07-10T02:08:00Z"
  generation: 1
  labels:
    app: spark-pi
    batch.kubernetes.io/controller-uid: 60e7f17b-57c7-4cd7-bd92-713377c26da9
    batch.kubernetes.io/job-name: spark-pi
    component: driver
    controller-uid: 60e7f17b-57c7-4cd7-bd92-713377c26da9
    job-name: spark-pi
  name: spark-pi
  namespace: spark-pi
  resourceVersion: "35279"
  uid: 60e7f17b-57c7-4cd7-bd92-713377c26da9
spec:
  backoffLimit: 0
  completionMode: NonIndexed
  completions: 1
  manualSelector: false
  parallelism: 1
  podReplacementPolicy: TerminatingOrFailed
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      batch.kubernetes.io/controller-uid: 60e7f17b-57c7-4cd7-bd92-713377c26da9
  suspend: false
  template:
    metadata:
      creationTimestamp: null
      labels:
        app: spark-pi
        batch.kubernetes.io/controller-uid: 60e7f17b-57c7-4cd7-bd92-713377c26da9
        batch.kubernetes.io/job-name: spark-pi
        component: driver
        controller-uid: 60e7f17b-57c7-4cd7-bd92-713377c26da9
        job-name: spark-pi
    spec:
      containers:
      - command:
        - /bin/bash
        - -c
        - |
          echo "=============================================="
          echo "  SparkPi Job"
          echo "=============================================="
          export SPARK_LOCAL_IP=$(hostname -i)
          /opt/spark/bin/spark-submit \
            --master local[2] \
            --driver-memory 512m \
            --class org.apache.spark.examples.SparkPi \
            /opt/spark/examples/jars/spark-examples_2.12-3.5.3.jar \
            1000
          EXIT_CODE=$?
          echo "SparkPi job finished with exit code: $EXIT_CODE"
          exit $EXIT_CODE
        image: apache/spark:3.5.3-nonexistent
        imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
        name: spark-submit
        resources:
          limits:
            cpu: 500m
            memory: 1Gi
          requests:
            cpu: 200m
            memory: "512"
        terminationMessagePath: /dev/termination-log
        terminationMessagePolicy: File
      dnsPolicy: ClusterFirst
      restartPolicy: Never
      schedulerName: default-scheduler
      securityContext: {}
      serviceAccount: spark-nonexistent
      serviceAccountName: spark-nonexistent
      terminationGracePeriodSeconds: 30
status:
  ready: 0
  startTime: "2026-07-10T02:08:01Z"
  terminating: 0
  uncountedTerminatedPods: {}

content.text: `spark-pi` service account exists. Now let's apply all the fixes: delete the broken job, fix the RBAC role, and recreate the job with corrections.

input.command:
kubectl delete job spark-pi -n spark-pi
kubectl patch role spark-pi-role -n spark-pi --type=json \
  -p='[{"op": "add", "path": "/rules/0/resources/-", "value": "pods"}]'
kubectl get role spark-pi-role -n spark-pi -o yaml

description:
kubectl delete job spark-pi -n spark-pi
kubectl patch role spark-pi-role -n spark-pi --type=json \
  -p='[{"op": "add", "path": "/rules/0/resources/-", "value": "pods"}]'
kubectl get role spark-pi-role -n spark-pi -o yaml

content.text: RBAC fixed. Now let's recreate the job with the corrected image, serviceAccountName, and memory format.

input.command:
cat > /tmp/spark-pi-job-fixed.yaml << 'EOF'
apiVersion: batch/v1
kind: Job
metadata:
  name: spark-pi
  namespace: spark-pi
spec:
  backoffLimit: 0
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: spark-pi
        component: driver
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: spark-submit
        image: apache/spark:3.5.3
        command:
        - /bin/bash
        - -c
        - |
          echo "=============================================="
          echo "  SparkPi Job"
          echo "=============================================="
          export SPARK_LOCAL_IP=$(hostname -i)
          /opt/spark/bin/spark-submit \
            --master local[2] \
            --driver-memory 512m \
            --class org.apache.spark.examples.SparkPi \
            /opt/spark/examples/jars/spark-examples_2.12-3.5.3.jar \
            1000
          EXIT_CODE=$?
          echo "SparkPi job finished with exit code: $EXIT_CODE"
          exit $EXIT_CODE
        resources:
          requests:
            cpu: "200m"
            memory: "512Mi"
          limits:
            cpu: "500m"
            memory: "1Gi"
      restartPolicy: Never
      serviceAccountName: spark-pi
EOF
kubectl apply -f /tmp/spark-pi-job-fixed.yaml

input.command:
NS=spark-pi
kubectl wait --for=condition=complete job/spark-pi -n $NS --timeout=120s
echo "=== job status ===" && kubectl get job spark-pi -n $NS
echo "=== pods ===" && kubectl get pods -n $NS
